ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_elements" (
  "data_element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data element */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data element */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data element */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Identifier for the data element (e.g., QH 040006) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data element (e.g., Version 2) */,
  "obligation" TEXT /* Obligation of the data element (e.g., Mandatory, None) */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the data element (e.g., Current, Superseded) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the data element */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the data element was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the data element */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the data element was last updated */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the data element (e.g., string, integer) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Data format of the data element (e.g., mm/dd/yyyy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_element_concepts" (
  "concept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data element concept */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data element concept */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data element concept */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Identifier for the data element concept (e.g., QH 041975) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data element concept (e.g., Version 1) */,
  "obligation" TEXT /* Obligation of the data element concept (e.g., None) */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the data element concept (e.g., Current) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the data element concept */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the data element concept was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the data element concept */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the data element concept was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "value_domains" (
  "value_domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value domain */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the value domain */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the value domain */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Identifier for the value domain */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the value domain */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the value domain */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the value domain was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the value domain */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the value domain was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_element_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "data_element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data element */,
  "related_data_element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related data element */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent, child, sibling) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the relationship */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the relationship */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_element_relationships_related_data_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_data_element_id") REFERENCES data_elements ("data_element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_element_relationships_data_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_element_id") REFERENCES data_elements ("data_element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "effective_dates" (
  "effective_date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effective date */,
  "data_element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data element */,
  "effective_from" TEXT /* Effective from date */,
  "effective_to" TEXT /* Effective to date */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the effective date */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the effective date was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the effective date */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the effective date was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effective_date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_effective_dates_data_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_element_id") REFERENCES data_elements ("data_element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "identifiers" (
  "identifier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each identifier */,
  "data_element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data element */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Identifier for the data element (e.g., QH 040006) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the identifier (e.g., Version 2) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the identifier */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the identifier was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the identifier */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the identifier was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("identifier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_identifiers_data_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_element_id") REFERENCES data_elements ("data_element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "obligations" (
  "obligation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each obligation */,
  "data_element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data element */,
  "obligation" TEXT /* Obligation of the data element (e.g., Mandatory, None) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the obligation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the obligation was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the obligation */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the obligation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obligation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_obligations_data_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_element_id") REFERENCES data_elements ("data_element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "approval_statuses" (
  "approval_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval status */,
  "data_element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data element */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the data element (e.g., Current, Superseded) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the approval status */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the approval status was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the approval status */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the approval status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approval_statuses_data_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_element_id") REFERENCES data_elements ("data_element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data steward, healthcare professional, admin) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the user */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data element being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data element */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data element was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the access log */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access log was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the access log */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_element_id") REFERENCES data_elements ("data_element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_rules" (
  "validation_rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "data_element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data element */,
  "rule" TEXT /* Validation rule for the data element */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the validation rule */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation rule was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the validation rule */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_rules_data_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_element_id") REFERENCES data_elements ("data_element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "data_element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data element */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., invalid value, inconsistent value) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the issue is resolved (true/false) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the issue */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the issue */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_issues_data_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_element_id") REFERENCES data_elements ("data_element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "data_element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data element */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_data_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_element_id") REFERENCES data_elements ("data_element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "data_element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data element */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who performed the action */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_data_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_element_id") REFERENCES data_elements ("data_element_id")
)
